use_cases: Decorative background element for landing pages and sections
Visual accent for brand graphics and marketing materials
Abstract geometric decoration for creative portfolios
Colorful visual interest for app onboarding screens
ai_summary: A geometric polygon visualization component displaying colorful shapes (triangle, square, hexagon, octagon) with solid fills and gradient accents. Features vertical layout with scaleBand positioning and adjustable sizing. Designed for decorative purposes in SaaS, media, and creative applications where abstract geometric visuals add visual interest.
